recentTweets.text:
I'm proud to lead what will be my final bipartisan Congressional delegation with @JerryMoran to the Farnborough Air Show.
 
I look forward to showcasing American manufacturing and innovation on the world stage and deepening trade relationships with our allies.

ACA enrollment is plummeting. Billions cut from Medicaid. Tax credits that help pay for premiums expired.

At every turn, Republicans are making health care less affordable.

American families deserve better.
https://t.co/H12rzqxCAa

Nobody should be forced to choose between life-saving medication or paying rent.

Yet this is reality for Americans managing diabetes.

We must end this crisis, and by capping insulin costs at $35 a month, my INSULIN Act would be a major step in doing just that.

Our nation is at war. Americans are struggling to afford everyday essentials.
 
Yet tonight, the President is using his time to rehash baseless grievances from six years ago.
 
Whatever he may claim, the President lost in 2020. It has been proven over and over.

The momentum is with Ukraine.

Russia's economy is being hit hard, their oil infrastructure is under attack by Ukrainian drones and they are losing over 30,000 casualties a month in Ukraine.

The more pressure we can put on Putin now, the better chance we have to end this war. https://t.co/NzScK0DiGI

Donald Trump cannot accept he lost in 2020.

Whatever he may claim about that election tonight, don't believe him. https://t.co/z1dfkPTbPU

This new Russia sanctions bill is an effort to narrow the focus and to really get at those countries that are helping to fund this war in Ukraine and fund Russia's war machine.

China is number one on the list. https://t.co/w7ynWsAmf3

I am so proud to see my bill to cap insulin costs at $35 a month advance one step closer to a vote on the Senate floor!

I urge my Senate colleagues to move this bill forward, which is sorely needed to lower costs for Americans with diabetes.

President Trump has made billions since stepping foot in the Oval Office last January—a staggering windfall emblematic of dictators like Vladimir Putin.

While you struggle to afford groceries, the President is focused on adding much more to his fortune.
https://t.co/g0W83Uzx8o

The American people overwhelmingly think that we should not be in a war with Iran, and they don't want to see the increased costs in energy and gasoline prices.

It's important for us to get back to the negotiating table with Iran. https://t.co/vxdifTkAs8

The Trump Administration reduced training for ICE agents, hired unqualified people and did nothing to ensure ICE agents in Maine were wearing body cameras.

They are responsible for what happened in Maine. It is completely unacceptable and must end now. https://t.co/gsU9EVMvRn

Putting troops on the ground in Iran or on Kharg Island or in the region in a way that's going to endanger more lives is not something that the American people will support.
 
The President has had no strategy for this war from the very beginning. It's been a failed effort. https://t.co/8RUMQ73Cho

This Russia sanctions bill is a one-two punch that's really going to put pressure on Putin.

It comes at a time when there's real momentum on behalf of Ukraine. Russia's losing over 30,000 casualties a month in Ukraine.

This is a real opportunity to get Putin to the table. https://t.co/VSYyNDaabX

Yesterday, @POTUS claimed he was going to charge a 20% toll on traffic in the Strait of Hormuz, then backtracked.

Despite asking Congress for billions to backfill the Iran war, it appears the Pentagon doesn’t know how it will use foreign funds to enforce a military blockade. https://t.co/3Ku6qpTafc
RT @SFRCdems: "With the introduction of our new Russian sanctions legislation, we will finally put real pressure on Vladimir Putin to get h…

RT @SFRCdems: 🚨TUNE IN NOW🚨
 
@SenatorShaheen, @SenBlumenthal, @SenKatieBritt and others hold a press conference on Russia sanctions legisl…

On Monday, ICE agents were involved in yet another deadly shooting, this time in Maine.

There must be a full and transparent investigation into what happened, why it happened and what can be done to prevent more deaths.

For decades, @UofNH and @NOAA have produced critical research, and I'm proud to have secured millions in federal funding to support their efforts.

It was wonderful to see the site of their new research center, which will ensure our state remains a global leader in ocean mapping. https://t.co/wqPyYSGrwK

Since the President started his war in Iran, families in New Hampshire have had to pay nearly $600 more for gas.

And now, with President Trump restarting the war, the burden on families across my state will only get worse. https://t.co/AYukmbD4TW

Republicans refused to extend ACA enhanced premium tax credits, and now we’re seeing the result: spiking premiums that are making health care even more unaffordable.

Americans want lower costs, yet Republicans are doing just the opposite.
https://t.co/vZRBg6S065

I am shocked and deeply saddened to learn of my friend Senator Lindsey Graham’s sudden passing. Billy and I are keeping his loved ones, constituents and staff close in thought.

My full statement: https://t.co/jGJ4HMqrNI

Despite @POTUS' efforts, the 21st Century ROAD to Housing Act became law today—a major bipartisan victory that will lower costs for millions.
 
I was proud to secure 3 provisions that will cut red tape, expand supply and streamline housing construction in the Granite State.
RT @SFRCdems: JUST IN: @SenatorShaheen, @SenBlumenthal, @LindseyGrahamSC and @SenatorWicker announce agreement on legislation to hold purch…

July is Disability Pride Month and marks the 36th anniversary of the historic Americans with Disabilities Act.

Let us all take a moment to recognize the strength and resilience of those with disabilities and recommit ourselves to building a more inclusive and accessible nation.
RT @SFRCdems: WATCH: @SenatorShaheen's reaction to meetings with new Hungarian government during the first official high-level U.S. delegat…

My INSULIN Act would deliver much-needed assistance to millions of Americans by capping insulin costs at $35 a month. 

With a bipartisan group of cosponsors spanning 21 states and counting, there is nationwide support for this bill, and I’m committed to getting it passed. https://t.co/c9vczyQFVx

Ukraine is the most innovative military in Europe at the moment. They aren't just a user of U.S. weapons, but a key provider of support, as we've seen during the war in Iran.

It's in our national security interest to learn from their technological advancement on the battlefield. https://t.co/yw7vPiqxcf

This is a war that President Trump never should’ve undertaken. None of the goals that he set out in the beginning have been accomplished.

He needs to get back to the negotiating table, but he needs to negotiate a deal that’s going to benefit the United States and not Iran. https://t.co/TFHepaSDcC

Trillions cut from health care and food assistance. Hospitals slashing services or closing altogether. American families going hungry.

All to pay for tax cuts for our nation’s wealthiest.

This is the legacy of President Trump's "Big Beautiful Bill."
https://t.co/cw2ZSTcF55

RT @SFRCdems: BREAKING: President Trump throws support behind drone deal with Ukraine: “I think we’re going to make that deal.”

@SenatorSh…

It's not just about us supporting the Ukrainians, but what we're getting back from Ukraine.

With the technological advances of how war today is being conducted, the Ukrainians are better than anybody else in the world. We need to learn from them. https://t.co/vb9Tct4Ywi
RT @SFRCdems: “It was an honor to once again speak with President @ZelenskyyUa during the @NATO Summit. I reaffirmed the Senate’s strong bi…
RT @ZelenskyyUa: I met with a bipartisan delegation from both houses of the United States Congress Senators – @SenatorShaheen, @LindseyGrah…

NATO defense spending is a good news story.
 
All 32 NATO Allies are at 2% of GDP. Now, the goal is to get to 5% of GDP, and there are a number of nations that are well on their way. Seven at this point are over 3%. https://t.co/jZmxsA9g0t

Momentum has shifted and Ukraine is doing well. Russia is experiencing casualties of over 30,000 a month and they have lost territory. Their economy is in dire straits.

Now is the time to finally put pressure on Putin to bring him to the negotiating table. https://t.co/ghEaXNSuMw

No one should go broke to afford the medication they need, yet this is all too often reality for many Americans with diabetes.

By capping insulin at $35 a month, my bipartisan INSULIN Act would be a major step toward ending this crisis.

The most important message coming out of Ankara is for our adversaries to understand that the NATO Allies are united, that we are working together.
 
The only leaders who benefit when the NATO Allies are divided are Vladimir Putin in Russia and President Xi in China. https://t.co/C3SFf28cxX

For weeks now, the President has refused to sign landmark housing legislation passed by Congress.

While he may call it a “yawn,” Americans across the country are relying on this bill to lower their costs—and the President is standing in the way.
https://t.co/y3VJuUM7H6

The President has made billions from the crypto industry while in office, including payments from people in the industry he has pardoned.

He's using the highest office in the land to enrich himself and shamelessly admits it.
RT @SFRCdems: 🚨NEW: Today, @SenatorShaheen, Ranking Member of @SFRCDems and Co-Chair of the Senate NATO Observer Group, will arrive in Anka…

Happy National Parks and Recreation Month!

Now more than ever, it is so important to protect and support our national parks and their staff, who work tirelessly to support the Granite State’s outdoor spaces and economy.

Find a park near you! 
https://t.co/srzuOyiqKS

Today isn’t about one party, one part of America’s history or even one person, it’s about what unites us.

It was wonderful to celebrate America’s founding and 250th Birthday with @SenatorHassan and our fellow Granite Staters in Concord.

Happy Fourth, New Hampshire! https://t.co/8YlabyB4kG

Happy 4th of July, and Happy 250th Birthday to the United States of America!
 
Since its founding, our nation remains the global beacon of democracy abroad. While we continue striving for a more perfect union, today we also celebrate all that makes us proud to be Americans.

I was honored to help establish a Congressional time capsule in celebration of our 250th birthday.

We don't know what future generations will think about us, nor can we know the challenges they will face.

But with this time capsule, they'll know something about who we were. https://t.co/Q5NOeuD5TB

By refusing to sign the 21st Century ROAD to Housing Act, the President is intentionally prolonging high housing prices in our state.

I hear from folks across New Hampshire about how unaffordable housing has become. We must get this bill signed into law to address this. https://t.co/vuVPzuwyoL

In Colebrook, I was excited to see the energy around building and redeveloping a new wellness center that will reinvigorate the area—a project I secured $2.7 million in federal funding to support.

Yesterday, it was great to speak with everyone turning this vision into reality! https://t.co/LLsyrGImNu
https://t.co/gYHnB1XaWd

Dark money has no place in our politics.

We must remain a government for the people, by the people. That's why year after year I've led a constitutional amendment to overturn the disastrous Citizens United ruling. https://t.co/C3WIPk7wML

ICYMI: Last week, @SenatorHassan and I introduced legislation to combat substance use disorder by increasing funding for prevention and recovery programs in NH and across the country.

While we’ve made great progress, this fight is far from over. 
https://t.co/O9u66kMgAt

Resident-owned manufactured housing communities like Fox Hill are critical to ensuring housing is affordable in the Granite State.

It was wonderful to tour Fox Hill today and discuss how the 21st Century ROAD to Housing Act would lower costs for communities across the state. https://t.co/KW6neUhf3Y

President Trump made over $2 billion last year, with over half of his income coming from crypto—including money from convicted money launderers he then pardoned.

While everyday Americans struggle under high prices, the President is enriching himself with self-dealing.

With the extreme heat and humidity we're experiencing across New Hampshire this week, I urge all Granite Staters to take precautions to ensure the safety of themselves and their families amid surging temperatures.

Click below to learn more⬇️
https://t.co/YE5TShNxsm

RT @SenSchumer: One year after the GOP passed the One Big UGLY Bill, the results are in:

• 800,000 kids lost SNAP benefits.
• 5M lost heal…

Across the country, hardworking Americans have to pay thousands of dollars a year to afford their life-saving insulin medication.

With health care costs rising across the board, we must keep fighting to cap insulin at $35 a month and deliver real relief to millions of families.

This ruling means even more money in politics that will further impact our electoral system.
 
Americans, not special interests, must be represented in our democracy. That’s why I’ve fought to repeal Citizens United and will continue fighting against today’s decision.

It makes no sense that the warriors who put their lives on the line to protect our country cannot seek justice in cases of sexual assault and harassment.

My bipartisan bill with @SenJohnKennedy would right this wrong.
https://t.co/kl8rm5UBol

Birthright citizenship is enshrined in the 14th Amendment of the Constitution.

I'm relieved that the Supreme Court ruled in line with an amicus brief I led and struck down the President's unconstitutional and obsessive attempts to revoke citizenship from children born in the US.

Dairy farmers are the backbone of New Hampshire’s agricultural sector.

As we near the end of National Dairy Month, I remain committed to this essential industry that works to supply all Granite Staters with access to fresh, locally produced milk products.

Congress just passed one of the most important housing bills in decades that will lower costs for Granite Staters and expand housing supply across the country.
 
Now, all that’s left is for the President to sign it—which he’s refused to do for nearly a week. https://t.co/jGpZ24PrAi

Today's ruling is a major victory amid the President's baseless attacks on our electoral system and reckless assault on voting rights.

This is a step toward ensuring that all Americans, including our servicemembers, can be confident their voices will be heard at the ballot box.

The momentum is with Ukraine.

Russia's economy is being hit hard, their oil infrastructure is under attack by Ukrainian drones and they are losing over 30,000 casualties a month in Ukraine.

The more pressure we can put on Putin now, the better chance we have to end this war. https://t.co/NzScK0DiGI

The American people overwhelmingly think that we should not be in a war with Iran, and they don't want to see the increased costs in energy and gasoline prices.

It's important for us to get back to the negotiating table with Iran. https://t.co/vxdifTkAs8

In Colebrook, I was excited to see the energy around building and redeveloping a new wellness center that will reinvigorate the area—a project I secured $2.7 million in federal funding to support.

Yesterday, it was great to speak with everyone turning this vision into reality! https://t.co/LLsyrGImNu

The cost of everything is up, and energy prices are no exception. My bipartisan legislation would ensure federal funding from 2 critical programs is made available without delay so that communities and families can benefit from energy efficiency upgrades that lower utility bills.

assessment.summary: The captured X archive has 4 Kurdistan Lens tweet hits for Jeanne Shaheen. The social-media posture reads as constructive or diplomatic signal because the strongest matched frame is support, partnership, or official-contact language. Top matched terms: Oil / Energy.
assessment.whatItWasLike: When this account mentioned the Kurdish file, the language most often clustered around support, partnership, or official-contact language. I count 0 direct Kurdistan/Kurdish-region term hits, 0 security-frame hits, 1 supportive or diplomatic hit, 0 humanitarian/minority hits, and 4 energy/economic hits in the exported profile window. The latest matched tweet is dated 2026-07-16T22:13:52Z and should be opened before treating this as a final stance.
